triples.subject: Global penetration
triples.sentence: Global penetration is seen rising to 13% this year from 12% in 2023.

triples.subject: U.S. EV adoption
triples.object: new sales penetration rising close to ~8%
triples.sentence: In the U.S., on the surface it looks like EV adoption continued to progress, with new sales penetration rising close to ~8%.

triples.subject: Authors
triples.object: 1.47 million units of new EV sales in 2024
triples.sentence: Applying the matrix to their 2024–25 EV sales forecasts, the authors forecast 1.47 million units of new EV sales, or 9.1% penetration in 2024.

triples.subject: Forecast for 2025
triples.sentence: For 2025, the forecast is for 2.34 million units, or 13.8% penetration.
